message: Just got here - is this really happening right now? We're actually live?
Yeah, we're live - and honestly, it's strange to see it out there without one more pass at the language, but Stephanie was right to push back on the repetition Thursday, so here we are.
You pushed back on yourself and it landed - that's the whole thing right there.
That's exactly it - you stop defending and it works.
The restraint thing - that's what made the difference, yeah. Turns out saying less about cornmeal actually lets people taste it.
Yeah, well. Don't get cocky about it - we'll see what the numbers say tomorrow. But tonight, it's done right. That's enough.
